claim_supported: IPL1 copies IPL2 to IMEM; CPU runs IPL2; IPL2 stages and enters IPL3; x105 consumes and mutates retained IMEM.

limitations: Matching disassembly is source-level reverse engineering, not official specification; no assembly or bytes imported.

path_or_page: n64docs Overview physical memory map and Boot Process / Simulating the PIF ROM
claim_supported: SP IMEM address/capacity, reset vector, common post-PIF registers, DMEM boot staging, and IPL3 entry.

limitations: Explicitly work in progress and emulator-oriented; its whole-0x1000 DMEM wording is less precise than pinned N64-IPL source.

claim_supported: RSP owns separate 4 KiB IMEM and 4 KiB DMEM; RSP fetches microcode from IMEM.
